description: Connection between Au nanogap and ScAlN SAW-IDT structure

confirmed_facts.conclusion: Au nanogap (1.5-3.3 nm) is 100-300x smaller than IDT pitch. Au nanogap cannot function as IDT electrode for 5GHz SAW.

theoretical_proposal.status: Theoretical proposal. No peer-reviewed paper confirmed as of 2025.
theoretical_proposal.concept: Au nanogap as passive target structure: SAW-generated piezoelectric field concentrates at Au nanogap, coupling to nano-element (quantum dot, molecule, TLS) placed at gap. This is physically distinct from IDT electrode function.
physical_basis: SAW wavelength (360-540 nm) >> Au nanogap (1.5-3.3 nm)
Local field concentration at nanogap possible via plasmonic enhancement
DIET pre-treatment of ScAlN substrate removes TLS before IDT fabrication
theoretical_proposal.connection_to_this_work: Au nanogap DIET (de Graaf 2018) removes surface TLS. ScAlN SAW substrate with low TLS density enables higher Q SAW resonator. Au nanogap as TLS sensor (Tool 1) monitors substrate quality.

limitations: No peer-reviewed paper proposes ScAlN SAW + Au nanogap combination
SAW field concentration at nanogap not calculated (FDTD required)
Coupling efficiency between SAW and nanogap element unknown
source_SAW: Zhang et al. JAP 114, 243516 (2013); Rayleigh wave approximation
source_DIET: de Graaf et al. Nature Communications 9, 1143 (2018)
